summary: Verified the tool-loading speed fix. Homepage pills now render optimistically (~0.62s), no blocking 'Loading...' spinner from ToolStatusWrapper, all 5 tools render their actual UI in <1s, no 'Sorry, deze tool is offline' screen. Search still works. Animated gradient background and Koodh footer regression PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: PasswordGenerator.jsx uses `<style jsx>` which triggers a React warning in the console ('Received true for a non-boolean attribute jsx'). This is a pre-existing minor issue, unrelated to the current loading-speed fix; recommend switching to plain `<style>` or adopting styled-jsx properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend-only tool-load-speed fix verified via Playwright against the preview URL. All 5 tool routes (/password /dpd /printer /sscreen /wea) render titles in ~0.4-0.8s with domcontentloaded and never show ToolStatusWrapper's offline screen. Homepage pills (Webcam & Audio Tester, Dead Pixel Detector, Wachtwoord Generator...) appear in ~0.6s from optimistic default enabledToolIds list. Search debounce of 300ms filters correctly. Console shows a pre-existing benign React warning from PasswordGenerator's `<style jsx>` block – not related to this fix.
rca of the issue: Original slowness stemmed from (a) ToolStatusWrapper blocking children behind a network call to /api/tools/{id}/status, and (b) 1000ms internal progress animation in each tool. Fix: optimistic render in ToolStatusWrapper (enabled=true by default, only flip false if backend explicitly says so), reduced progress duration to 300ms + 50ms trailing timeout, and LandingPage seeds enabledToolIds with the known 5 tool ids so pills render instantly. Verified: pills <1s, tools <1.5s, no offline flash.
